ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bank account */,
  "tin" TEXT /* Tax Identification Number (TIN) associated with the account */,
  "bank" TEXT /* Name of the bank where the account is held */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Account number of the bank account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., checking, savings, business) */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Current status of the account (e.g., active, inactive, frozen) */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was opened */,
  "closing_date" TEXT /* Date when the account was closed, if applicable */,
  "monthly_fee" INTEGER /* Monthly fee charged for the account */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Current balance of the account */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the account information */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the account */,
  "branch" TEXT /* Branch where the account is held */,
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier of the employee linked to the account, if applicable */,
  "wfh_eligible" TEXT /* Indicates whether the account is eligible for work-from-home (WFH) benefits (Y/N) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_tin FOREIGN KEY ("tin") REFERENCES employees ("tin"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the employee */,
  "tin" TEXT /* Tax Identification Number (TIN) associated with the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the employee */,
  "hire_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was hired */,
  "termination_date" TEXT /* Date when the employee was terminated, if applicable */,
  "home_address" TEXT /* Home address of the employee for WFH arrangements */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the employee */,
  "benefits_eligibility" TEXT /* Other benefits the employee is eligible for (e.g., health insurance, retirement plan) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the employee's information */,
  "wfh_eligible" TEXT /* Indicates whether the employee is eligible for work-from-home (WFH) benefits (Y/N) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each bank account
Tax Identification Number (TIN) associated with the account
Name of the bank where the account is held
Account number of the bank account
Type of the account (e.g., checking, savings, business)
